title: Find My Device - Connected / Nearby device details
scenario: Verify the Connected/Nearby device details screen displays device name, status, description, and play button when HS is paired and connected.
steps: Start the App with HS paired and connected.
Tap on Find My Device (if prompted allow access to GPS location).
expected: New window shows Device name, Status (Connected), description "Make sure this device is being used as your main audio source to play tone", and a Play Button.
